scripts.test: mise exec node@22.10.0 -- node --import tsx/esm ../runner/src/cli.ts --import ./src/coverage-register.ts 'test/*.test.ts' 2>&1 | tee /tmp/coverage-result.txt; cat /tmp/coverage-result.txt
scripts.test:coverage: mise exec node@22.10.0 -- node --import tsx/esm ../runner/src/cli.ts --coverage --import ./src/coverage-register.ts 'test/*.test.ts' 2>&1 | tee /tmp/coverage-cov-result.txt; cat /tmp/coverage-cov-result.txt
